query:
SELECT 'carbon_nbn' as source, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN carbonMonthlyCost > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_cost, ROUND(AVG(carbonMonthlyCost),2) as avg_cost FROM services WHERE carbonServiceId != '' AND carbonServiceId IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 'tiab_plans', COUNT(*), SUM(CASE WHEN baseCharge > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), ROUND(AVG(baseCharge),2) FROM tiab_plans
UNION ALL
SELECT 'tiab_services_active', COUNT(*), SUM(CASE WHEN status='Active' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), NULL FROM tiab_services
UNION ALL
SELECT 'vocus_mobile', COUNT(*), SUM(CASE WHEN planCost > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), ROUND(AVG(planCost),2) FROM vocus_mobile_services
UNION ALL
SELECT 'vocus_nbn', COUNT(*), 0, NULL FROM vocus_nbn_services
UNION ALL
SELECT 'retail_bundles', COUNT(*), SUM(CASE WHEN customerExternalId IS NOT NULL AND customerExternalId != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), NULL FROM retail_bundles;
